_comment: Human-blessed golden baseline for the fixed input (sample_data/MISM-2024-Results.pdf). Activated 2026-06-01 (LLM Council): the finder now runs this meet through the real pipeline with a club KNOWN to be in it (club_filter) so it exercises the full content path, and diffs the deterministic output against these numbers. cards/achievements use baseline.py's conservative regression diff (alarm below an absolute floor or under 60% of baseline). The structural fields (club_filter, parsed_swim_count, known_swimmers) are exact/structural invariants asserted by ground_truth.py. Raise/update these via PR ONLY (never auto-advanced) when an intended engine change moves them; an unexpected change is a deterministic regression finding. REBASELINED 2026-06-15: the multi-column PDF-extraction fixes (#619 975f99a, #631 af296be — 'Read multi-column result PDFs correctly', row F1 0.53 -> 0.99) landed after the 2026-06-01 blessing and now recover the full multi-column row set, moving parsed_swim_count 1217 -> 3597 (verified 3574 distinct swimmer/distance/stroke/time/age/gender tuples, max multiplicity 2 — recovered rows, not duplication; deterministic across processes). The richer parse re-shapes detection, moving cards/achievements 177 -> 160; all four known_swimmers still surface on cards.
